appraisal_events.evidence: « l'esprit de Swann était extrêmement apprécié dans sa coterie »; la princesse « se mit à rire aux éclats » à son compliment métaphorique, tandis que la marquise de Saint-Euverte le prenait au pied de la lettre.
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann shines by a poetic compliment that the princess savors as a sign of wit recognized in the Guermantes coterie, which locally places him above the less fine interlocutors.

status_effects.explanation: His wit is publicly savored by the princess and set as the coterie’s norm, which strengthens his position in the exchange.
